args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
- Reads as: 376 lines
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper creates apps and combines handlers. Exports Factory class with createApp and createMethods for multi-handler routes.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: 142 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
- Safe summary: Route helper extracts matched route data from context. Returns route arrays and path strings with parameter substitution.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
- Reads as: 141 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper defines event handlers and WSContext class for send/close operations.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: 146 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie helper reads/writes cookies with support for signed cookies and __Secure- and __Host- prefixes.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: 28 lines
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/hono
- Safe summary: Testing helper creates client instance for app testing with custom fetch implementation.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: 91 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper extracts environment variables based on runtime (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light).

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: 253 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper generates CSS with class names. Exports css() template function, cx() combiner, keyframes and viewTransition.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, rawCssString, toHash
- Reads as: 329 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
- Safe summary: CSS utility functions generate class names with hash-based slugs, minify CSS, and build style strings from template literals.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: 191 lines
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch for proxy requests. Removes hop-by-hop headers and supports strict RFC 9110 Connection header validation.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: 80 lines
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Dev helper inspects and displays registered routes with methods, paths, and handler names. Optional color output.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: 58 lines
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML helper builds escaped HTML strings from template literals. Supports callbacks and async values.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: 15 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: SSG (Static Site Generation) helper exports main toSSG function and middleware for SSG parameter handling.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks
- Reads as: 471 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/client/utils, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime
- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation fetches route content concurrently, saves to filesystem, and handles plugins and hooks.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: 88 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg
- Safe summary: SSG utility functions join paths, filter static routes, detect dynamic routes with :param or *, and prevent path traversal.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: 84 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: SSG middleware exports parameter middleware and context detection helpers. Only runs on SSG generation.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: 10 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports stream functions for server-sent events and text streaming.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: 46 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Safe summary: Base streaming function creates TransformStream-based Response. Handles abort errors and Bun version compatibility.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: 101 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/html, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Safe summary: SSE streaming function writes Server-Sent Events with event/id/retry fields. Sets chunked encoding headers.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: 16 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/streaming
- Safe summary: Text streaming function sets Content-Type to text/plain and X-Content-Type-Options nosniff. Wraps base stream function.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: 7 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper exports function to match accept headers against supported types.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept
- Reads as: 50 lines
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header matcher parses Accept-Language header and returns best match based on q values or default.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
- Reads as: 7 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types
- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper exports type definitions for connection info access.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: 46 lines
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo
- Safe summary: Connection info types define remote address, port, transport protocol, and IPv4/IPv6 address type.
